issues.description: 摘要中有无正文支撑的声明: Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves an overall Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of 0.133 and a remarkably low MAE of 0.081 on mixed urban scenes.
issues.evidence: 摘要中提到但正文中未详细论述
issues.suggestion: 建议核对正文第4章的实验结果部分和第5章的结论部分，确保包含了这些具体的量化评估结果。

issues.description: 摘要中有无正文支撑的声明: Specifically, a three-layer angular signal decomposition model was introduced to physically disentangle the angular signal into illumination, disparity, and material residual components.
issues.evidence: 摘要中提到但正文中未详细论述
issues.suggestion: 建议在正文的Methodology（Chapter 3）部分确认是否有对这些特定组件和分层结构的完整文字描述。

issues.description: 摘要中有无正文支撑的声明: Based on extracted geometric features, a dual-branch architecture adaptively routed features to dedicated Lambertian EPI and non-Lambertian geometric branches via a pixel-wise material mask.
issues.evidence: 摘要中提到但正文中未详细论述
issues.suggestion: 建议检查Chapter 3的具体内容，确保这些核心网络架构和路由机制得到了充分说明。

issues.description: 摘要中有无正文支撑的声明: The model was optimized using a staged training strategy with domain-balanced sampling and guided training utilizing angular gradient pseudo-labels for precise mask learning.
issues.evidence: 摘要中提到但正文中未详细论述
issues.suggestion: 建议在正文的方法论或实验设置部分（Chapter 3或Chapter 4）补充这些模型优化与训练策略的具体细节。

issues.description: 摘要中有无正文支撑的声明: Furthermore, through systematic experiments, the physical boundaries of EPI methods are rigorously defined, revealing that the coupling of data scarcity and physical assumption violation fundamentally bottlenecks non-Lambertian performance.
issues.evidence: 摘要中提到但正文中未详细论述
